title: Senior Doctor - Zydus Lifesciences - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Zydus Lifesciences - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
